reforms.description: The tax reform effective from 1987 aims to reduce tax allowances, broadening the tax base and enabling fiscal tightening while lowering marginal tax rates.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By broadening the tax base and lowering marginal tax rates, the reform is expected to enhance economic efficiency and incentivize investment.
reforms.status_evidence: The tax reform represents a first step in reducing tax allowances.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform is significant as it addresses tax structure inefficiencies, which can have a broad impact on economic behavior and resource allocation.
reforms.source_quote: The tax reform, effective as from 1987, represents a first step in this direction.
